title: Place an order with shipping and payment details
description: Verify that an authenticated customer can complete checkout by entering shipping details, providing a UTR reference, and reaching the order success page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /checkout
Fill in the shipping address fields with valid details
Review the order summary
Enter a valid UTR number in the payment reference field
Place the order
Verify the order success page is displayed

title: Register a new customer account
description: Verify that a visitor can create a new account with name, email, and password and reach an authenticated account state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Switch to registration mode
Fill in the full name field with a new customer name
Fill in the email field with a new customer email
Fill in the password field with a new customer password
Submit the registration form
Verify the authenticated account state is displayed

title: Sign in with email and password
description: Verify that a customer can sign in with valid credentials and reach an authenticated account state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the authenticated account state is displayed

title: Add a product to the cart from the shop
description: This verifies that a shopper can add an item to the cart directly from the catalog and see the cart reflect the change.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop
Click add to cart for a product in the catalog
Verify the cart update is visible
Click the link to open the cart page
Verify the cart contains the added product

title: Open a featured product from the home page
description: This verifies that an anonymous visitor can see featured products on the home page and open a product detail page from there.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify featured products are displayed
Click a featured product
Verify the product detail page is displayed

title: Manage cart item quantities and remove items
description: Verify that a shopper can update quantities in the cart, remove an item, and see the cart total refresh accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /cart
Verify cart items are displayed
Increase the quantity of one cart item
Decrease the quantity of the same cart item
Remove the item from the cart
Verify the cart updates to reflect the removed item and refreshed total

title: Review product details and add a chosen quantity to the cart
description: This verifies that a shopper can review a product’s details, choose a quantity, add it to the cart, and see the updated cart state.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop
Click a product from the results
Select a quantity
Add the product to the cart
Verify the cart update is visible
Click the link to open the cart page
Verify the cart contains the selected product quantity

title: Go from the home page to the shop catalog
description: This verifies that an anonymous visitor can use the main navigation to reach the shop catalog and browse products.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the shop page
Verify the product catalog is displayed

title: Create a new product with an image
description: This verifies that an admin can add a new product, upload an image, and save it so the product appears in the catalog.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/products
Click the add product action
Fill in the product name field with Premium Trial Product
Fill in the product price field with a valid price
Fill in the product description field with a short product description
Select a product category
Upload a product image
Save the new product
Verify the new product appears in the product list

title: Search, filter, sort, and open a product from the shop
description: This verifies that a shopper can narrow the catalog in the shop, see the updated results, and open a product detail page from the filtered list.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop
Fill in the search field with a product name
Select a category filter
Select a sort option
Verify the product grid is updated
Click a product from the results
Verify the product detail page is displayed

title: Proceed from cart to checkout
description: Verify that a shopper can move from the cart into the protected checkout flow when ready to place an order.

steps.description: Navigate to /cart
Verify cart items are displayed
Click the option to proceed to checkout
Verify the checkout page is displayed

title: Update an order status
description: This verifies that an admin can change an order from pending to verified and see the updated status reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/orders
Change an order status to verified
Verify the updated order status is displayed

title: View account details and past orders
description: An authenticated customer can open the account page and see their profile information along with previous orders.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /account
Verify profile information is displayed
Verify past orders are displayed

title: Review and filter admin orders
description: This verifies that an admin can open the orders page, view the order list, filter it by status, and see the list update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/orders
Select an order status filter
Verify the filtered order list is displayed

title: Edit an existing product
description: This verifies that an admin can open an existing product, update its details, and save the changes successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/products
Open an existing product for editing
Update the product name field
Update the product price field
Save the product changes
Verify the updated product appears in the product list

title: Open admin order management from the dashboard
description: An admin can move from the dashboard into order management.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Open order management from the dashboard
Verify the order management view is displayed

title: View admin dashboard statistics
description: An admin can open the protected dashboard and review store metrics.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Verify dashboard statistics are displayed

title: Open admin product management from the dashboard
description: An admin can move from the dashboard into product management.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Open product management from the dashboard
Verify the product management view is displayed

title: Open admin category management from the dashboard
description: An admin can move from the dashboard into category management.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Open category management from the dashboard
Verify the category management view is displayed

title: Open admin user management from the dashboard
description: An admin can move from the dashboard into user management.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Open user management from the dashboard
Verify the user management view is displayed

title: Delete a product
description: This verifies that an admin can remove a product from the catalog and no longer see it in the product list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/products
Click the delete action for a product
Confirm the deletion
Verify the product is no longer shown in the list

title: Add a new category
description: This verifies that an admin can create a new product category and see it added to the category list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/categories
Fill in the category name field with Seasonal Specials
Save the new category
Verify the new category appears in the category list

title: View the registered users list
description: An admin can open the user management page and see the registered users list displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the user management page
Verify the registered users list is displayed

title: Return to account and sign out
description: An authenticated customer can open the account page and sign out successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /account
Sign out of the account
Verify the user is signed out
Verify the login page is shown

title: Search for a user by name or email
description: An admin can search the user list and see matching users displayed in the results.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to the user management page
Search for a registered user by name or email
Verify matching users are displayed

title: Open the contact page from the main navigation
description: This verifies that an anonymous visitor can navigate to the contact page and see contact information and the inquiry form.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the contact page
Verify contact information and the inquiry form are displayed

title: Open the about page from the main navigation
description: This verifies that an anonymous visitor can navigate to the about page and read the store story.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the about page
Verify the about content is displayed

title: Continue shopping from the cart
description: Verify that a shopper can leave the cart and continue browsing products without losing access to shopping.

steps.description: Navigate to /cart
Verify cart items are displayed
Click the option to continue shopping
Verify the user reaches the shopping area

title: Send a contact inquiry
description: A visitor can submit the contact form and see a confirmation that the message was sent.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill in the name field with Test Visitor
Fill in the email field with visitor@example.com
Fill in the subject field with Product question
Fill in the message field with I would like more information about your products.
Submit the contact form
Verify a message sent confirmation is visible

title: Edit a category name
description: This verifies that an admin can update an existing category name and see the change reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/categories
Open an existing category for editing
Update the category name field
Save the category changes
Verify the updated category appears in the category list

title: Delete a category
description: This verifies that an admin can remove a category and no longer see it in the category list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/categories
Click the delete action for a category
Confirm the deletion
Verify the category is no longer shown in the list

title: Return to the shop from a product detail page
description: This verifies that a shopper can open a product detail page from the shop and return to the shop catalog afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop
Click a product from the results
Click the link to return to the shop page
Verify the product catalog is displayed

title: View store contact details
description: A visitor can open the contact page and review the store contact information.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Verify store contact details are displayed

title: Request a password reset
description: Verify that a customer can request a password reset from the login page and see confirmation that the request was initiated.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Switch to password reset action
Enter the account email in the reset field
Submit the reset request
Verify a reset confirmation is visible

title: View product details before returning to the shop
description: This verifies that a shopper can inspect a product detail page and return to the shop catalog without losing navigation context.

steps.description: Navigate to /shop
Click a product from the results
Click the link to return to the shop page
Verify the product catalog is displayed

title: Show validation when checkout fields are missing
description: Verify that checkout prevents submission when a required shipping field is missing and shows validation feedback before the order is placed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /checkout
Fill in the shipping address fields while leaving one required field empty
Attempt to place the order
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the order is not placed

title: Submit a contact inquiry with required fields missing
description: A visitor who leaves contact fields empty sees validation feedback and cannot submit the inquiry.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Submit the contact form
Verify contact form validation errors are visible

title: Return from login to the home page
description: Verify that a visitor can leave the login page and return to the home page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Click the option to return to the home page
Verify the home page is displayed
